title: cryptocarya alticola
intro: Cryptocarya alticola, also known as the Western Australian sassafras, is a plant species belonging to the Lauraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of C. alticola include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made from the leaves or bark.
